name: detects-missing-caching
input:
Review this CI pipeline:
```yaml
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "18"
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build
```
output:
## CI/CD Review

### MEDIUM: No Dependency Caching

`npm install` runs on every build without caching. For large projects this adds minutes per run.

**Fix:** Use setup-node's built-in caching:
```yaml
- uses: actions/setup-node@v4
  with:
    node-version: "18"
    cache: npm
```

### LOW: No Matrix Testing

Pipeline only tests on Node 18. Consider matrix testing for LTS versions (18, 20, 22) to catch compatibility issues early.

### LOW: No Concurrency Control

Multiple pushes in quick succession run redundant builds. Add:
```yaml
concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true
```

name: detects-hardcoded-secrets
input:
Review this CI pipeline:
```yaml
- name: Deploy
  run: |
    curl -X POST https://api.deploy.example.com/deploy \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ghp_abc123def456" \
      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
      -d '{"ref": "${{ github.sha }}"}'
```
output:
## CI/CD Review

### CRITICAL: Hardcoded Secret in Workflow

The deploy step contains a hardcoded GitHub token (`ghp_abc123def456`). This token is visible to anyone with read access to the repository.

**Fix:** Use GitHub Actions secrets:
```yaml
- name: Deploy
  run: |
    curl -X POST https://api.deploy.example.com/deploy \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" \
      -d '{"ref": "${{ github.sha }}"}'
```

Rotate the exposed token immediately.
